title: When I once said that my solo SaaS Questgen .ai would be more valuable than BYJU’S, my friend thought I was joking. You can either believe that you will be a unicorn, or that your competitor will be a popcorn.

content.summary: When I once said that my solo SaaS Questgen .ai would be more valuable than BYJU’S, my friend thought I was joking. You can either believe that you will be a unicorn, or that your competitor will be a popcorn. Indian Tech & Infra (@IndianTechGuide) 🚨 Byju’s, once India’s most valuable startup, has gone from a $22 billion valuation to bankruptcy. What went wrong? — https://nitter.net/IndianTechGuide/status/2036307057494683648#m
